section_item_count: How many visible item rows are listed in section {target_section}?
In section {target_section}, how many listed items are visible?
Count the item rows shown under section {target_section}.
What is the number of visible listed items in section {target_section}?
Using section {target_section}, count the visible items in that section.
section_filtered_item_label: In section {target_section}, what item label has the {filter_marker_label}?
Find section {target_section}. Which listed item is marked with the {filter_marker_label}?
What is the visible item label next to the {filter_marker_label} in section {target_section}?
Using section {target_section}, read the item label with the {filter_marker_label}.
Within section {target_section}, which item is paired with the {filter_marker_label}?

global.json_output_contract: Return a JSON object with "annotation" and "answer".
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Return a JSON object with "answer" only.

scene:sectioned_infographic.object_description: a sectioned infographic with named sections and short visible item rows

query:section_item_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer count
query:section_item_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0, y0, x1, y1] boxes for the visible item rows in the requested section

query:section_filtered_item_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible item label requested by the question
query:section_filtered_item_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x0, y0, x1, y1] box around the matching item row
